title: curtisiaceae
intro: The taxonomic rank curtisiaceae is a family of plants. It is a rank that groups plants with shared characteristics into a family, typically containing multiple genera. The curtisiaceae family is part of the flowering plant group and is often referred to as the "Curtisia family" or "Curtisiaceae family". This family is characterized by its unique features, such as leaf shape and flower arrangement, that distinguish it from other plant families.
